{{CargoOrgan
|name=Crimson Eye
|type=Bionic
|rank=orange
|id=10683
|idx=41
|description=A blood-hued, hypnotic eye with the power to command blood and illusion. Under its gaze, veins rebel — though its bloodshot appearance often earns it the nickname "pinkeye"...
|skill=Activate Crimson Wing, dealing DMG for 2 times (DMG each time = 101% of ATK)!
|hp=1542
|def=305
|atk=149
|rush=237
|gene1=Per organ awakened, {race} RUSH +5
Organs awakened: 40/40
|gene2=Per organ awakened, {race} ATK +5
Organs awakened: 40/40
|gene3=If you spot a weakness, {race} ATK +75
|gene4=Wind DMG +90
|gene5=If you spot a weakness, DMG +4.5%
|gene7=Per orange or higher organ equipped, {race} ATK +90 (Awakened)
|}}
